title: Run for the Hills, Geronimo!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's relaxing Black Hills vacation turns into a wild treasure hunt with family, friends, and a mountain lion! 🏔️

q.en: Which travel agency books Geronimo's relaxing vacation?
q.zh: 是哪家旅行社为杰罗尼摩安排了这次轻松的假期？

explain.en: Geronimo heads to his trusted travel agency, The Wander Rat, and talks to Ms. Samantha Sweetpaws, who books his trip.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩去了他信任的旅行社“漫游鼠”，和萨曼莎·甜爪女士商量，由她安排了行程。

q.en: At the airport, what happened to Geronimo's first-class ticket?
q.zh: 在机场，杰罗尼摩的头等舱机票发生了什么？

options.en: It was canceled and replaced with a Dirt Cheap Airlines ticket
options.zh: 它被取消了，换成了一张廉价土航空的机票

options.en: He lost it on the taxi ride
options.zh: 他在坐出租车时弄丢了

options.en: It was upgraded to an even better seat
options.zh: 它被升级成了更好的座位
他其实根本没订过机票

explain.en: The counter mouse says nothing is booked in his name; his first-class MouseAir ticket was canceled and someone booked him a Dirt Cheap Airlines ticket made of tattered tissue.
explain.zh: 柜台的老鼠说找不到他的订票记录；他原本的老鼠航空头等舱票被取消了，有人给他换了一张用破纸巾做的廉价土航空机票。

q.en: Who surprises Geronimo on the plane?
q.zh: 在飞机上，是谁给杰罗尼摩来了个惊喜？

options.en: His cousin Trap and six family friends
options.zh: 他的表哥特拉普和六位亲友
一位叫野威利的飞行员

explain.en: Trap, Thea, Petunia Pretty Paws, Bugsy Wugsy, Benjamin, Bruce Hyena, and Grandfather William Shortpaws all remove cowboy hats and shout 'Surprise!'
explain.zh: 特拉普、蒂奥、佩图尼亚·美爪、巴格西·武格西、本杰明、布鲁斯·鬣狗和威廉·肖特波爷爷都摘下牛仔帽，齐声大喊“惊喜！”

q.en: What does the treasure map smell like, and where was it found?
q.zh: 那张藏宝图闻起来是什么味道，又是在哪里找到的？

options.en: Rotten fish; found in a garbage can with fish guts at New Mouse City's docks
options.zh: 腐烂的鱼腥味；在新老鼠城码头一个装满鱼内脏的垃圾桶里找到

options.en: Fresh cheese; found in a library
options.zh: 新鲜的奶酪味；在图书馆里找到

options.en: Roses; found in a flower shop
options.zh: 玫瑰花香；在花店里找到

explain.en: Trap found the map at New Mouse City's docks, thrown into a garbage can filled with fish guts, so it stinks of rotten fish.
explain.zh: 特拉普是在新老鼠城码头找到这张图的，它被扔进一个装满鱼内脏的垃圾桶，所以散发着腐烂的鱼腥味。

q.en: On Mount Rushmore, which president's eye hides the next clue?
q.zh: 在拉什莫尔山上，下一条线索藏在哪位总统的眼睛里？

options.en: Theodore Roosevelt (the only one wearing glasses)
options.zh: 西奥多·罗斯福（只有他戴着眼镜）

explain.en: The map says 'peek,' meaning glasses; Theodore Roosevelt is the only president on Mount Rushmore wearing glasses, so Geronimo is lowered into his eye.
explain.zh: 藏宝图说“别忘了偷看（peek）”，意指眼镜；拉什莫尔山上只有西奥多·罗斯福戴着眼镜，于是杰罗尼摩被吊进他的眼睛里。

q.en: What message is written inside Theodore Roosevelt's eye?
q.zh: 西奥多·罗斯福眼睛里写着什么信息？

options.en: There are jewels that no mouse can part, These should be left within Earth's heart.
options.zh: 有些珠宝任何老鼠都不能分开，它们应当留在大地的心脏之中。

options.en: Seek the gold at Bear's Lodge.

explain.en: Hidden in a corner of Roosevelt's eye, Geronimo finds a scroll reading 'There are jewels that no mouse can part, These should be left within Earth's heart.'
explain.zh: 在罗斯福眼睛的一个角落里，杰罗尼摩找到一卷羊皮纸，上面写着：“有些珠宝任何老鼠都不能分开，它们应当留在大地的心脏之中。”

q.en: Which cave does the clue 'within Earth's heart' lead them to?
q.zh: “留在大地的心脏之中”这条线索把他们引到了哪个洞穴？

explain.en: Wild Willie pages through the guidebook and realizes 'Earth's heart' means Jewel Cave, which sparkles like semiprecious stones.
explain.zh: 野威利翻看旅游指南，推断出“大地的心脏”指的是宝石洞，因为洞里的方解石像半宝石一样闪闪发光。

q.en: What shape is the pool where Geronimo finds the next clue, and what is the highest point of the Black Hills?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩找到下一条线索的水池是什么形状？黑山的最高点又叫什么？

options.en: A heart-shaped pool; the highest point is Harney Peak (7,242 feet)
options.zh: 心形的水池；最高点是哈尼峰（海拔7242英尺）

options.en: A square pool; the highest point is Devils Tower
options.zh: 方形的水池；最高点是恶魔塔

options.en: A round pool; the highest point is Mount Rushmore
options.zh: 圆形的水池；最高点是拉什莫尔山

options.en: A star pool; the highest point is the Golden Dreams Hotel
options.zh: 星形的水池；最高点是黄金梦酒店

explain.en: Geronimo splashes into a heart-shaped pool; the pebbles spell a clue pointing to 'the Black Hills' highest crest,' which Wild Willie names as Harney Peak at 7,242 feet.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩一头栽进一个心形的水池；池底的小石子拼出一条指向“黑山最高峰”的线索，野威利指出那就是海拔7242英尺的哈尼峰。

q.en: How does Geronimo save Bugsy Wugsy from the mountain lion?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩是如何从山狮口中救下巴格西·武格西的？

options.en: His hysterical screaming frightens the lion away
options.zh: 他歇斯力里的尖叫把狮子吓跑了
他用空手道和狮子搏斗

explain.en: Geronimo slips and falls into the gorge; the last thing he sees is the mountain lion running away, because his hysterics frightened it off.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩脚下一滑掉进峡谷，他最后看到的是山狮转身跑掉——原来他歇斯底里的尖叫把狮子吓走了。

q.en: What is 'Bear's Lodge' also known as, where the final clue points?
q.zh: 最后一条线索所指的“熊之屋”，又叫什么？

options.zh: 恶魔塔，位于怀俄明州东北部

explain.en: The parchment says to seek gold 'At the foot of Bear's Lodge'; Geronimo's guidebook shows Bear's Lodge is also called Devils Tower, a tall rock in northeastern Wyoming.
explain.zh: 羊皮纸说要去“熊之屋脚下”寻找黄金；杰罗尼摩的旅游指南显示，熊之屋又叫恶魔塔，是怀俄明州东北部一座高耸的岩石。
